title: Agent Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter required at the top of every agents/<slug>/AGENT.md.

id.description: Kebab-case identifier. Must match the folder name agents/<id>/.

class.description: runtime = user-facing; build = skill-library factory agent.

version.description: Semver. Bump when the agent's plan or output contract changes.

requires_org.description: True if the agent refuses without a live-org target alias.

modes.description: Named operational modes. Single-mode agents use ["single"]; dual-mode use e.g. ["design", "audit"]. Enumerated to catch typos at schema time (historical bugs: ["n", "audit"], ["s"]). Extend the enum when a new mode is genuinely needed.

owner.description: Team or handle responsible for this agent.

compatible_mcp.description: Optional: minimum MCP tool wave this agent requires (e.g. "wave-0").

expected_mcp_calls.description: Optional: rough upper bound on MCP tool invocations per run — surfaces cost.

deprecated_in_favor_of.description: Required iff status == deprecated. The replacement agent id.

harness.description: Optional: declares the agent inherits a shared harness under agents/_shared/harnesses/. The validator enforces shape compliance for declared harnesses. designer_base was added in Wave 3c.
